caption: A group of people is gathered in a room with wood-paneled walls and horizontal blinds in the background. A man wearing glasses, a dark vest over a white shirt, and dark trousers stands at a podium, addressing an audience seated in blue chairs. To his left, another person is seated behind a small table with a red and white logo. The audience members are viewed from behind; they wear various casual clothes, including a blue and red patterned shawl and a yellow sweater. A white sign with the red text "Exit" is visible on the right wall. The white text "ORCA" is superimposed in the bottom right corner of the scene. Across the sequence, the speaker at the podium adjusts his position and raises his right hand to his forehead, while the audience remains seated and attentive.
